content:
Answers were fascinating as I could know what they really feel about programming

4 min read
1 hour ago

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by Yan Krukau: https://www.pexels.com/photo/healthy-man-couple-woman-6818300/I asked some programmers what they feel about programming. What is programming to them? And I was surprised to hear their answers.
I found out that for most of them, especially those senior programmers, programming is just not a job that they do. This is what they love to do even outside of their job, which is not so common among other career paths. Here are some answers I got.
Game
Coding is like a game for some programmers. It’s not hard; it’s not easy. It just gives tremendous joy after being able to solve problems like games. In games, you have to solve the game step by step.
Like you have all the controls over the system and know how to manage it. All you have to do is now solve those. Programming feels like handling the world means the app users and the system are being performed the way they want.
Every programmer like to give instructions to the system, so it’s like developing your hobby app.
then nobody will interface with you, and you can make it as you want it using whichever language you like; there are no restrictions like there…
